description: Pristine Toyota Harrier 2019 model, recently imported and fully registered. Features a panoramic sunroof, premium leather interior, advanced safety sensing suite, and a highly efficient 2.0L engine. Perfect for family and executive use.

Experience luxury with this Mercedes-Benz C200 AMG Line. Comes packed with ambient lighting, Burmester surround sound, widescreen cockpit, and dynamic select driving modes. Impeccably maintained by a single overseas owner.

The ultimate king of the road. This locally used Toyota Land Cruiser V8 ZX trim is built for the toughest Kenyan terrains while offering unmatched luxury. Features 4WD, KDSS suspension, rear entertainment screens, and a cool box.

Aggressive styling meets legendary performance. This Subaru Impreza WRX boasts a turbocharged boxer engine, symmetrical AWD, manual transmission for pure driving thrill, and upgraded STI exhaust system.

Well-kept Toyota Prado TX locally used mostly for city commutes and occasional upcountry trips. Has a robust 3.0L diesel engine, 7-seater capacity, beige leather interior, and an updated aftermarket Android infotainment system.

Stunning Mazda CX-5 in Soul Red Crystal. Extremely low mileage foreign-used unit. Features Mazda's SkyActiv technology, Bose sound system, head-up display, and advanced i-Activsense safety features. A true joy to drive.

Reliable and spacious Nissan X-Trail. This locally used unit comes with a panoramic roof, 360-degree camera, electronic tailgate, and economical 2.0L hybrid engine. Serviced exclusively at Nissan franchise.

Very clean Honda Vezel Hybrid RS. Offers incredible fuel economy without compromising on sporty looks. Features paddle shifters, half-leather sporty seats, Honda Sensing safety, and a very spacious boot.

A well-maintained enthusiast's car. This Toyota Mark X 250G offers a smooth V6 engine, rear-wheel drive layout, dual-zone climate control, and upgraded 18-inch alloy rims. Minor scratches on the rear bumper.
Elegant BMW X3 xDrive20d. Features xDrive intelligent all-wheel drive, full leather Dakota upholstery, professional navigation system, and LED headlights. Freshly imported and fully duty-paid.

Practical and efficient Mitsubishi Outlander PHEV (Plug-in Hybrid). Save drastically on fuel costs while enjoying 4WD capability. Includes Apple CarPlay/Android Auto, power tailgate, and heated seats.
The perfect daily driver or Uber/Bolt car. This Toyota Axio WXB is extremely reliable and economical. Comes with original alloy wheels, reverse camera, push-to-start button, and dark fabric interior.
